hero.headline: Storm damage? *We climb up* so you don't have to
hero.subheadline: Real roofers with real ladders — not a call center halfway across the country.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every roof, every repair
services_section.subheading: From missing shingles to complete tear-offs

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Hail, wind, and tree damage handled fast. We work with your insurance to get it covered.

services.title: Roof Replacement
services.description: Complete tear-off and install when repairs won't cut it. New shingles, new gutters, new peace of mind.

services.title: Leak Detection
services.description: Water spots on your ceiling? We find where it's getting in and seal it up right.

services.title: Gutter Service
services.description: Clean, repair, or replace gutters and downspouts. Keep the water flowing away from your foundation.

about.heading: Built for Louisville weather
about.body: We're a Louisville roofing team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one crew, one bill.

cta.heading: Ready to fix that roof?
cta.body: Free estimate, honest pricing, no pressure. Just real answers about what your roof needs.
